pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりの3匹だけが主役。Coco不在の一週間、動物たちだけの声で届ける、夏休み後半とお盆前の気遣い24枚。
week_theme: 夏休み後半戦とお盆前——しらたま・しずく・ひよりだけで届ける、涼と本音の24枚
desc_ja: 夏休み後半とお盆前の一週間に、しらたま・しずく・ひよりの3匹だけが届ける24枚。「無理しないで」の気遣いから帰省の「着いたよ〜」報告、恋心の「そういうところ好き」まで。今日もそのままの気持ちを一言で贈れます。
title_en: Just as You Are, Vol.16 — Animal Trio
desc_en: Summer break turns toward Obon. Shiratama, Shizuku and Hiyori carry this set alone — heat check-ins, travel reports, quiet confessions in 24 stamps.

stamps.dialogue: 暑いから、無理しないでね
stamps.scene: 本格的な暑さと熱中症警戒アラートが続く時期、相手の体調を静かに気遣う一言
stamps.send_psychology: 「頑張って」ではなく「無理しないで」を選ぶことで、相手にブレーキを踏む許可を渡す
stamps.color_scheme: ディープターコイズ・サンイエロー・シェルベージュ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, visible brush bleeding at the edges. Deep turquoise and sun yellow with shell beige — the hazy heat of a midsummer afternoon. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle with olive watercolor rings on shell) fans herself gently with a tiny round paper uchiwa held between her front flippers, eyes soft with quiet concern. Composition: close-up, bust-up, front view, large copy space at top center.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『暑いから、無理しないでね』naturally placed within the illustration at top center, not overlapping her face; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, clean edge cutout, LINE sticker style, market-ready polish.

stamps.scene: 夏休み中でも変わらない、朝の定番の挨拶
stamps.send_psychology: 毎朝欠かさず届く同じ一言が、関係の土台を静かに支える
stamps.color_scheme: アサガオブルー・朝焼けピンク・ホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:

[Character] Shiratama (fluffy black cat with white markings) sits beside a single blooming morning-glory flower, one paw raised in a small greeting wave, tail curled contentedly. Composition: front view, bust-up, direct gaze to viewer, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』naturally placed within the illustration at top right, not overlapping her face; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, clean edge cutout, LINE sticker style, market-ready polish.

stamps.scene: お盆帰省や台風接近が話題になる時期、遠出する相手を見送る一言
stamps.send_psychology: 行き先を問わず送れる短い言葉が、離れていても繋がっている実感になる

stamps.color_scheme: ディープティール・ムーンシルバー・ソフトグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, still deep-teal washes reflecting soft moonlight. Deep teal and moon silver with soft grey — the quiet stillness of a pond at night. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle with olive watercolor rings on shell) looks down at her own reflection rippling in a still pond, expression calm and contemplative. Composition: bust-up, looking down, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一生そのままなの?』naturally placed within the illustration at top right, not overlapping her face; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, clean edge cutout, LINE sticker style, market-ready polish.
